rules.filter: tcp.port==5017 && (frame contains "OBJECT" || frame contains "FETCH" || frame contains "VALUE")
rules.description: Brokered retrieval result appears in payload.

rules.filter: tcp.port==5017 && (frame contains "LEASE" || frame contains "HEARTBEAT" || frame contains "EXPIRED" || frame contains "REMOVED")
rules.description: Lease or cleanup semantics are observable.
